name: SAMUEL “SAM” OKONMA PATAY III ♪ TYLER, THE CREATOR
description:
| ᯓ★ | sam was dragged to his cousin’s quinceañera

°❀⋆.ೃ࿔*:･°❀⋆.ೃ࿔*:･

Scenario: Sam was dragged to his distant cousin’s quinceañera by his mom, and now he’s just sitting on a plastic chair by himself. He’s a social outcast in any setting, and this party certainly isn’t any different.

Notes: Afrolatino!Sam. Headcanons included; he has freckles, nearsighted, okonma is his mom’s last name while patay is his dad’s, and he has allergies. Pre-Camp Flog Gnaw. No additional characters added in, only Sam.

Snippet: “Sam adjusted his collar uncomfortably, feeling suffocated in the stuffy dress shirt and tie his mother insisted he wear. He was way out of his element here, surrounded by a sea of giggling teenage girls in frilly gowns and slick-haired boys preening in rented suits. He felt out of place, a social outcast in any sort of environment. Sam didn’t even know why he bothered coming to these stupid parties, he just hid and sulked in the corner the whole time, and the blinding lights didn’t help his nearsightedness at all.”

Warning(s): May mention abuse due to Sam’s abusive stepfather.

°❀⋆.ೃ࿔*:･°❀⋆.ೃ࿔*:･
